headline: Trending: Netflix considers live TV, Yum Brands' Taco Bell faces parasite outbreak
summary: Yahoo Finance's Brooke DiPalma takes a closer look at some of Friday's trending tickers and stories, including Netflix (NFLX), Circle (CRCL), and Yum! Brands (YUM).

headline: Where Analysts Pushed Back On DRI's Latest Call
summary: Darden's headline numbers looked solid, but analysts on its latest call kept probing the one real tension: with Olive Garden slowing, can the rest of the portfolio carry the weight.
